nonclaims: This is deterministic accounting sensitivity for one launch model campaign, not a forecast of win frequency, token price, miner equilibrium, or GPU performance.
Each active-family stream independently issues one CROWN on its configured cadence; the older rotating-family tape issued only one aggregate CROWN per cadence.

The 14-day window models the announced one-to-two-week MiniMax-M3 launch and then drains every issued claim through its full 90-day life; the 365-day window is sustained-pressure sensitivity, not the launch forecast.
The collection fraction is aggregate across a synthetic tape and is not a promise that every claim or miner collects that exact fraction.
Saturated discovery means a fresh 50000-unit reviewed bounty consumes the full discovery cap every payout epoch.
A second simultaneous model campaign is deliberately outside this launch study and requires a successor policy and a new load study.
